name: Dave Koz
abstract: David Stephen Koz (born March 27, 1963) is an American saxophonist, composer, record producer, and radio personality based in Los Angeles, California.

concerts.label: Ivan Lins and His Music
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Derek Brown
about_quotes.evidence: Him and then even more I think my first two saxophone CDs I was given was Kenny G and Dave Koz... I would put on that Dave Koz and I had my little transcription book and I would just close my eyes and play.
about_quotes.doc_title: Derek Brown interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 5, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Kent Jordan
about_quotes.evidence: whether it’s Cannonball Adderley, Dave Koz, Donald Harrison, try it yourself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kent Jordan interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 22, 2006
